name: Repair ASAP LLC
description: Repair ASAP LLC is a licensed and insured NYC handyman service for repairs, installations, furniture assembly, TV mounting, appliance installation, painting, flooring, AC installation and cleaning, minor plumbing and electrical fixture work, and new apartment setup.

booking.instructions: Call or text photos, location, timing, and building requirements for a quote before work begins.

trustSignals: COI support for NYC co-ops and condos
Same-day and next-day availability may be available

reviews.excludedFromAggregate: Additional TaskRabbit testimonials from a previous profile are shown on the reviews page but are not counted in the 73-review aggregate rating.
